meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no version control (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Guide: User Onboarding & Solving Version Control
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding and eliminate version control headaches as a freelancer. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver professional, scalable SaaS apps fast.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracking code states. By integrating automated user onboarding, you create a structured environment where user data is versioned via database snapshots, effectively bypassing local file-system volatility. Use Antigravity to scaffold your onboarding flow and Claude Code to automate the deployment of these persistent states instantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a client’s production environment, heart pounding, realizing the 'latest' version of the codebase is actually a fragmented mess of forgotten local changes. The lack of proper version control isn't just a technical debt; it’s a ticking time bomb that threatens your reputation and your revenue.

But what if you could bypass the chaos? By mastering user onboarding as a systematic entry point, you can force data persistence and state management from the first click. This guide strips away the complexity, leveraging AI-native tools to turn your freelance workflow into an automated, bulletproof machine.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding State Schema
steps.description: Establish a rigid database schema for user onboarding to ensure every user session is tracked, providing a secondary layer of state versioning.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SQL schema for a 'user_onboarding_states' table that captures session progress, timestamps, and previous state snapshots.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create migration for onboarding_states table with snapshot columns'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Create a modular onboarding wizard that forces users to commit their initial data, creating an entry point for versioned records.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a React-based multi-step onboarding component that pushes state updates to the database on every step change.

steps.title: Implement Auto-Snapshotting
steps.description: Trigger a snapshot of the user's data state upon completion of each onboarding step to prevent loss during deployment cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that triggers a snapshot of user progress whenever the onboarding state updates in the database.

steps.title: Automate Deployment with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to sync your local environment with the production database, ensuring code and data parity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment script that validates current code version against the latest production snapshot.

steps.title: Verify State Consistency
steps.description: Run an automated audit to ensure that onboarding states match the expected versioned data in your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated test suite that compares current user onboarding progress against historical snapshot records.

pro_tips: Always store 'User Onboarding' state in a separate database table from your application logic to prevent schema migrations from breaking user progress.
Use JSONB columns in Postgres for onboarding snapshots to allow for flexible data structures as your client's needs evolve.
Never deploy code without a corresponding database migration script; treat your database as the primary version control source.
Implement a 'rollback' flag in your onboarding wizard that allows users to revert to the previous snapshot if they encounter errors.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for your onboarding flow automatically; it keeps your clients informed without extra work.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on setting up a CI/CD pipeline that triggers an automatic snapshot on every merge request.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start shipping professional-grade software that keeps clients coming back for more. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
